query:
SELECT cnj,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.tribunal')) AS tribunal,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.tribunal_acronym')) AS tribunal_sigla,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.justice_description')) AS justica,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.instance')) AS instancia,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.area')) AS area,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.phase')) AS fase,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.status')) AS status_jud,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.amount')) AS valor,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.city')) AS cidade,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.state')) AS estado,
  JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.subjects') AS assuntos,
  JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.last_step') AS ultima_mov
FROM processos 
WHERE raw_payload IS NOT NULL 
LIMIT 2;
